title: Challenging meeting with stakeholders
use_when: Challenging meeting with stakeholders. Use when the user needs a product workflow for stakeholder management related to challenging meeting with stakeholders. Trigger terms: stakeholders, meeting-prep, risk-management.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Challenging meeting with stakeholders when the request is mainly technical implementation, analytics modeling, or UX critique; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Challenging meeting with stakeholders stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
framework_fit: Challenging meeting with stakeholders fits Stakeholder Communication work in the Align lifecycle when the user needs Challenging meeting with stakeholders stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Challenging meeting with stakeholders stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner without tying recommendations to the user's Align stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Challenging meeting with stakeholders as generic Stakeholder Communication advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Challenging meeting with stakeholders when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $challenging-meeting-with-stakeholders to turn this challenging context into a decision-ready Challenging meeting with stakeholders stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner.
examples.expected_artifact: Challenging meeting with stakeholders stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
